title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology's video explores AI pair programming as a collaborative development approach, highlighting how AI tools assist developers in debugging, code review, and improving productivity. The content frames AI as an effective teammate for software development workflows.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains AI pair programming, an approach where AI tools collaborate with developers across software workflows. It covers how these tools assist with debugging, code review, and code generation, framing AI as a teammate rather than a replacement. The takeaway is a view of where AI fits into development tasks and how it contributes to developer productivity.
